description: A photograph depicting an expansive, dry, and textured Mediterranean grassland landscape under a cloudy sky in Extremadura, Spain. The foreground is covered with sparse, low-lying scrub and dry grasses. On the distant horizon, a tall, slender utility structure (likely a power line pole) is visible. The context indicates these are grasslands that were ploughed 3-5 years prior to remove invading scrubs. The image credits state "Credits: European Union, 2012. LUCAS".
